rows.prompt: Summarize only what is explicitly stated on this page.

result.response: The Riverside Learning Archive contains digitized letters from regional educators and offers online access to the catalog for visitors to search or request in-person viewing by appointment.

documents.extracted_text:
Riverside Learning Archive

The archive opened to the public in 2018.
It contains 12,400 digitized letters from regional educators.
Visitors may search the catalog online or request in-person viewing by appointment.
The current exhibition runs through July 30.
The page does not state why attendance increased this year.

The page does not state why attendance increased this year.

rows.response: The Riverside Learning Archive contains digitized letters from regional educators and offers online access to the catalog for visitors to search or request in-person viewing by appointment.
